title: Rich Roasted American Sweet Potato Casserole
description: A fatty and snappy festive American dish featuring caramel and dry roasted sweet potatoes, perfect for the holidays, this vegetarian friendly casserole is a crowd pleaser.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the cubed sweet potatoes, brown sugar, salt, and black pepper, and toss until the sweet potatoes are evenly coated.
Spread the sweet potatoes out in a single layer on a large baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes.
While the sweet potatoes are roasting, combine the heavy cream, melted butter, and caramel sauce in a small bowl and whisk until smooth.
After the sweet potatoes have roasted for 20 minutes, remove them from the oven and pour the cream mixture over them, tossing until they are evenly coated.
Return the sweet potatoes to the oven and continue roasting for an additional 20 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly browned.
Remove the sweet potatoes from the oven and top with the marshmallows.
Return the casserole to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the marshmallows are lightly toasted.
